summary: Cricket biomechanics analysis app with batting and bowling analysis features, video upload capability, and Hindi language interface. Tribute app for Narendra Yadav.
architectural_notes: Hindi language UI throughout the application
Splash screen transitions to main app interface
Video upload accepts video/* file types
Analysis sections hidden by default, shown on button click

existing_features.title: Create a splash screen displaying 'रोहित नरेंद्र यादव' as the main heading (40px font size) and 'प्रस्तुत करते हैं' as a subtitle with cyan color (#00d2ff) and 3px letter spacing, with fade-in animation effect
Implement main app header displaying 'नरेंद्र बायोमैकेनिक्स क्रिकेट एनालिसिस' with dark blue background (#16213e)
Display user greeting 'नमस्ते! अपनी आईडी:' with user ID '#RN-2026' highlighted in yellow
Create batting biomechanics analysis button labeled '🏏 बैटिंग बायोमैकेनिक्स' that initiates batting analysis mode when clicked
Create bowling biomechanics analysis button labeled '⚾ बॉलिंग बायोमैकेनिक्स' that initiates bowling analysis mode when clicked
Implement about section button labeled 'ℹ️ अबाउट सेक्शन' that displays message: 'About: यह ऐप मेरे पिता नरेंद्र यादव के सम्मान और क्रिकेट की बारीकियों को समझने के लिए बनाया गया है।' when clicked
Create pro feature button labeled '⭐ प्रो फीचर (Live Coach)' that displays placeholder message: 'प्रो फीचर: जल्द ही आप सीधे एक्सपर्ट कोच से बात कर पाएंगे!' when clicked

Create hidden analysis box (initially display: none) with title 'एनालिसिस शुरू...', instruction text 'अपना वीडियो अपलोड करें (AI स्कैनिंग चालू होगी)', and video file upload input that accepts video formats
Apply consistent dark theme styling with background color #0f3460, cyan accent color (#00d2ff), and proper spacing (20px margins, 15px padding, 10px border radius) throughout the interface

new_feature_requests.summary: Splash screen with Hindi text and fade-in animation
Video upload functionality with AI scanning
Pro feature placeholder for live coach interaction
